message:
refactor: Split _collections.zig into modular directory structure

Split the 1705-line _collections.zig into a directory with focused modules:
- deque.zig (211 lines) - Double-ended queue
- defaultdict.zig (148 lines) - Dict with default factory
- ordereddict.zig (237 lines) - Insertion-ordered dict
- counter.zig (275 lines) - Counting dict + _count_elements
- chainmap.zig (101 lines) - Multiple mapping view
- userdict.zig (112 lines) - Dict wrapper for subclassing
- userlist.zig (101 lines) - List wrapper for subclassing
- userstring.zig (175 lines) - String wrapper for subclassing
- namedtuple.zig (181 lines) - Named tuple factory
- _collections.zig (99 lines) - Entry point with re-exports

This follows the CPython mirror convention where foo.zig OR foo/
directory covers the corresponding CPython module.
